/CAL:RESENTENCE ON PAROLE VIOLATION/3000REIN/PAJ: 180 DAYS/CTWP:45/HD/X:THIS SENTENCE IS TO RUN CONCURRENT WITH PROBATION CASE #21003315,/DEF:SHALLPARTICIPATE IN OUTPATIENT TREATMENT AS DIRECTED BY APD/DEF:SHALL NOT DRIVE FOR 90 DAYS/DTC/DEF:SHALL NOT USE ANY CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE/DEF:SHALL ABIDE BY STAY AWAY ORDER ISSUED ON 11-09-21/4019HALF/ /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TOREPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLEAGENT,/

/CAL:MODIFICATION OF SENTENCE ON ADMISSION OF PAROLE VIOLATION/CTORD:COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IMPOSED ON 11-09-21 IS VACATED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD:SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THEDEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:RE-SENTENCE ON ADMISSION OF PAROLE VIOLATION & PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT ON 11-16-21/DOP/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL CHECK IN WITH PAROLE WITHIN 24 HOURS OF RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/

/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/OR/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR  APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATIONS #1, BURGLARY, AND #3, POSSESSION OF AMPHETAMINE/3000REIN/PAJ: 180 DAYS/X:45 DAYS CTS IS WAIVED,/X:180 DAYS SERVABLE THROUGH HOME DETENTION,/X:DEFENDANT ALREADY PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONTIORING, TO BE MONITORED BYAPD, IN MATTER 21003315,/ /X:DEFENDANT MAY NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS,/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO FOLLOW THROUGH WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS  ORDERED IN PROBATION MATTER 21003315,/X:DEFENDANT MAY NOT USE DRUGS AND MUST SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTING THROUGH TREATMENT PROVIDER,/X:DEFENDANT MUST NOT DRIVE,/SA1:ART RENATA MURALIDHARA/SA2:555 MISSION ROCK STREET SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X:ANYRESTITUTION AND STAY AWAY ORDER IN PROBATION MATTER 21003315 IS HARVEY WAIVERED INTO THIS CASE,/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/CONTD:PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT AND STATUS OF ANKLE MONITOR/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/CTORD: PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/  /PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/NB/X: TIME ISNOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PAROLE PHC ON 10-28-21/CONTD:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING ON 11-09-21/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT ON PAROLE 3056 PETITION/NP/X: DEFENDANT IS UNABLE TO APPEAR IN COURT FOR MEDICAL REASONS,/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,//CONT/DOPC/
